passives.name: Jungle Companions
passives.effects: Summon a ''Gustwalker Hatchling'' companion to assist you in combat against monsters.

passives.name: Gustwalker's Gait
passives.effects: Feed your companion enough treats to evolve it and upgrade your {{si|Smite}}. Upon the companion reaching its final evolution, this item is consumed, granting you the {{bi|Gustwalker's Gait}} buff.

effects_structured.raw: Summon a ''Gustwalker Hatchling'' companion to assist you in combat against monsters.
Feed your companion enough treats to evolve it and upgrade your {{si Smite}}
Upon the companion reaching its final evolution, this item is consumed, granting you the {{bi Gustwalker's Gait}} buff.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Gustwalker Hatchling is modeled as a no-sell jungle starter that summons a companion and progresses via treat collection to Smite upgrade and final-evolution buff grant.
Final evolution consumes the starter item and grants the Gustwalker's Gait buff.
